creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
Here is the reworked patch that adds some maintainer targets
to ease the upgrades:
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/drupal6-views/2.6-to-2.8.diff

Tested the updated port on my Tinderbox for 7.x, 8.x and 9.x.
-- 
Eygene

 \`.|\..----...-'`   `-._.-'_.-'`   #  Remember that it is hard
 /  ' `         ,       __.--'      #  to read the on-line manual
 )/' _/     \   `-_,   /            #  while single-stepping the kernel.
 `-'" `"\_  ,_.-;_.-\_ ',  fsc/as   #
     _.-'_./   {_.'   ; /           #    -- FreeBSD Developers handbook
    {_.-``-'         {_/            #
